text:
(a) Instead of registering under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) a vehicle that the dealer owns, operates, or permits to be operated on a public street or highway, the dealer may apply for, receive, and attach metal dealer’s license plates to the vehicle if it is the type of vehicle:

(1) that the dealer sells; and

(2) for which the dealer has been issued a general distinguishing number.

(a) Instead of registering under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) a vehicle that the dealer owns, operates, or permits to be operated on a public street or highway, the dealer may apply for, receive, and attach dealer’s license plates to the vehicle if it is the type of vehicle:

(1) that the dealer sells; and

(2) for which the dealer has been issued a general distinguishing number.

(b) The board may adopt rules regulating the issuance and use of a license plate issued pursuant to the terms of this section.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.061 — Dealer’s License Plates

(a) Instead of registering under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) a vehicle that the dealer owns, operates, or permits to be operated on a public street or highway, the dealer may apply for, receive, and attach metal dealer’s license plates to the vehicle if it is the type of vehicle:

    (1) that the dealer sells; and

    (2) for which the dealer has been issued a general distinguishing number.

(a) Instead of registering under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) a vehicle that the dealer owns, operates, or permits to be operated on a public street or highway, the dealer may apply for, receive, and attach dealer’s license plates to the vehicle if it is the type of vehicle:

    (1) that the dealer sells; and

    (2) for which the dealer has been issued a general distinguishing number.

(b) The board may adopt rules regulating the issuance and use of a license plate issued pursuant to the terms of this section.

(a) Instead of registering under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) a vehicle that the dealer owns, operates, or permits to be operated on a public street or highway, the dealer may apply for, receive, and attach metal dealer’s license plates to the vehicle if it is the type of vehicle:

    (1) that the dealer sells; and

    (2) for which the dealer has been issued a general distinguishing number.

(a) Instead of registering under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) a vehicle that the dealer owns, operates, or permits to be operated on a public street or highway, the dealer may apply for, receive, and attach dealer’s license plates to the vehicle if it is the type of vehicle:

    (1) that the dealer sells; and

    (2) for which the dealer has been issued a general distinguishing number.

(b) The board may adopt rules regulating the issuance and use of a license plate issued pursuant to the terms of this section.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 668 (H.B.718), Sec. 12, eff. July 1, 2025.*
